metric_definition: pitch mean abs / yaw abs mean / norm mean in arcsec

method.name: fixedbaseline_outer1_then_param_outer_multi_round

outer1_baseline_replay_note.g1_g2_g3: accepted baseline replay with max_iter=5, carry_att_seed=True, wash_scale=0.5; 24-state also scale_wash_scale=0.5
outer1_baseline_replay_note.g4: accepted tuned pure-SCD replay with max_iter=5, alpha=0.995, transition_duration_s=2.0, apply_after_release_iter=1

method.scd_note: G4 keeps the accepted pure-SCD setting alpha=0.995, transition_duration_s=2.0, apply_after_release_iter=1
method.feedback_scale_origin_note: Default feedback_scale=2.2 follows the latest single-axis boundary-confirmation sweep (extrap5) as the best stable pure param-outer setting.
